title: Implement proxy support for Windows
body:
Implements Proxy support on Windows

As with mac, podman machine start will copy over proxy settings if present in the environment. Otherwise if there are no proxies specified in the env during start, settings will be cleared to match.

Resolves #14589 

```release-note
Implement Proxy support on Windows
```

[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]
